_note: Enoch's generation, from the Book of Jubilees 4. Enoch married his first cousin Edna (Jub 4:20), 'the daughter of his father's brother' — so her father Danel is a brother of Jared, i.e. Enoch's uncle. Danel is added as Mahalalel's son (Jared's brother); Edna (created in 07_biblical as Enoch's wife) becomes Danel's daughter, which renders the cousin-marriage correctly. Sorts after 07_biblical so Mahalalel/Edna exist.

children.label:
Danel (Daniel)
c.3540 BC · brother of Jared; Enoch's uncle & father-in-law
· Book of Jubilees 4:20
